name: ga4-analytics-showcase
description: GA4 Analytics Portfolio - Interactive dashboard, GTM demo, automated booklet generation

scripts.server: node -e "const http = require('http'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); http.createServer((req, res) => { const file = path.join(__dirname, req.url === '/' ? 'index.html' : req.url); fs.readFile(file, (err, data) => { if (err) { res.writeHead(404); res.end('404'); return; } res.writeHead(200); res.end(data); }); }).listen(8765, () => console.log('✓ Server on http://localhost:8765')); setTimeout(() => {}, 999999);"

author: Anthony Apollis
